zh.lifeSummary: 當Gershom Brooks於1624年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親Thomas Brooks28歲，母親Grace Cunliffe32歲。他於1665年3月12日與Hannah Eccles在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gershom Brooks于1624年1月1日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲Thomas Brooks28岁，母亲Grace Cunliffe32岁。他于1665年3月12日与Hannah Eccles在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可康可德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brooks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually a variant of Brook , with excrescent -s. The optional addition of -s, with no grammatical function, is usually post-medieval, but some examples of the same person's name occurring with and without -(e)s have been noted as early as the 14th century in South Lancashire. The -es in such cases probably has neither a plural nor a genitival function, and the name means ‘dweller at the brook’, not ‘dweller at the brooks’. A plural sense cannot be ruled out elsewhere, but a non-grammatical -(e)s must also be considered a strong possibility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Brucks
meanings: probably a habitational name from Brucks (also Brux) which derives from Middle Low German brōk ‘low-lying marsh’.
reportedly also an altered form of Flemish (Dutch) Broex, an old variant of Broeks (see Brooks ).

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Gershom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by a son of Moses (Exodus 2:22). It possibly means ‘exile’ (i.e. a person in exile) in Hebrew, but it is usually interpreted as ‘sojourner’, from Hebrew ger sham ‘a stranger there’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gershom Brooks was born on 1 January 1624, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Brooks, was 28 and his mother, Grace Cunliffe, was 32. He married Hannah Eccles on 12 March 1665, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1686, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gershom Brooks est né le 1 janvier 1624, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Brooks, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Grace Cunliffe, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Eccles le 12 mars 1665, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1686, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gershom Brooks am 1. Januar 1624 in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Brooks 28 und seine Mutter Grace Cunliffe 32. Er hat am 12. März 1665 in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah Eccles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1686 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gershom Brooks è nato il il 1 gennaio 1624 nel Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Brooks, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Grace Cunliffe, aveva 32 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Gershom Brooksが1624年1月1日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Brooksは28歳，母Grace Cunliffeは32歳であった。1665年3月12日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスコンコルドでHannah Ecclesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1686年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gershom Brooks(이)가 1624년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Brooks(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Cunliffe(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1665년 3월 12일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 Hannah Eccles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1686년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gershom Brooks nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1624, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Brooks, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Grace Cunliffe, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Eccles em 12 de março de 1665, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1686, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gershom Brooks родился 1 января 1624 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Brooks было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Cunliffe, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Eccles 12 марта 1665 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1686 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Hannah Eccles el 12 de marzo de 1665, en Concord, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1686, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años.
